name: VitalLoop Fit Band
short_description: Slim fitness band for steps, heart rate, sleep data, and light workout tracking.
full_description: Best for buyers who want a lightweight wrist tracker at a lower price than a full smart watch while still getting daily health insights.

name: VoltWay 20K Power Bank
short_description: 20,000mAh power bank for travel, field work, and long days away from outlets.
full_description: A high-capacity backup battery for phone-heavy users who want multi-charge reliability during commuting or remote work.

name: VoltWay 65W GaN Charger
short_description: Compact fast charger for phones, tablets, and USB-C laptops.
full_description: Useful for buyers who want one efficient charger for travel bags, desks, and mixed-device setups instead of carrying multiple bricks.
